title: Remove admin privilege check blocking the Users section

requirements.summary: Remove all remaining admin privilege checks that block the Users section in the admin panel, ensuring users can be displayed without role-based access errors
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the Users tab in the admin panel no longer shows an 'Admin privileges required' message.
The users table loads and displays all users without any access-denied error.
No backend function returns an access-denied or unauthorized error when fetching users.
No frontend code conditionally hides or blocks the Users section based on a role or admin flag.

file_operations.description: Remove any conditional rendering or error messages in the Users tab that check for admin privileges or roles before displaying the UsersTable component. Ensure the Users tab content renders unconditionally without access checks.

Remove any frontend guards, conditional rendering, or 'Admin privileges required' error messages that block the users table from loading. Remove any checks against user roles or admin flags that prevent the getAllUsers query from executing or displaying results. Ensure the table renders and fetches users without role-based restrictions.
